events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: missing hanger nails (empty holes) in connectors & fasteners, rough-complete stage. This is non-compliant because Simpson hangers require specific nails in all holes. Missing nails means non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision: fail. Risk: high (structural). Percent complete maybe 85. Confidence high.
